targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('week', created_at) AS time, SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved FROM traces WHERE ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR metadata->>'tenant_id' = '${tenant}') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 weeks' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('week', created_at) AS time, SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float) AS cost_saved FROM traces WHERE ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR metadata->>'tenant_id' = '${tenant}') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 weeks' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('week', created_at) AS time, metadata->>'user_id' AS metric, SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 weeks' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('week', created_at), 'Mon DD') AS week, SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved, ROUND(SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float)::numeric,2) AS cost_saved FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '8 weeks' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(created_at)

SELECT metadata->>'user_id' AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS calls, SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved, ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::float)::numeric,1) AS avg_pct_saving, ROUND(SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float)::numeric,4) AS cost_saved FROM traces WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('week', NOW()) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY tokens_saved DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Cost per User per Week (Last 8 Weeks)

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('week', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS week, metadata->>'user_id' AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS calls, ROUND(SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float)::numeric,4) AS cost_saved_usd FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '8 weeks' GROUP BY date_trunc('week', created_at), 1, 2 ORDER BY date_trunc('week', created_at) DESC, cost_saved_usd DESC

SELECT metadata->>'routed_model' AS model, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM traces WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('week', NOW()) AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY calls DESC

list.name: user_id
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT metadata->>'user_id' FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 weeks' ORDER BY 1
